author: playboicarti
explanation: This solution uses a hash map to store the indices of the numbers as we iterate through the array. For each number, we check if the complement (target - current number) exists in the hash map. If it does, we return the indices.

author: playboicarti
explanation: This solution uses a brute-force approach, checking all pairs of numbers to see if they add up to the target. This is less efficient than the hash map solution.
